title: More Nether Bricks
description: A mod adding two new types of Nether Bricks and associated blocks.
body:
![More Nether Bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/275b828a45793f454fa4710bfb9d2213222265de.png)

## Description
*More Nether Bricks* adds 2 new types of Nether Brick, adding more variety to Minecraft's block palette and giving a reason to mine Crimson Nylium and Warped Nylium with Silk Touch. 

### Features:
- Crimson Nether Brick, a brighter red variant of Nether Brick, crafted by smelting Crimson Nylium
- Warped Nether Brick, a teal variant of Nether Brick, crafted by smelting Warped Nylium
- Cracked, Chiseled, Stair, Slab, Fence, and Wall variants for both new Nether Brick varieties
- In-game documentation is available via [Treatise](https://modrinth.com/mod/treatise) if installed

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
